description: Zaai Dev brand brief + captured design references for MCP-compatible AI tools.
name: io.github.POLONIBOI/zaai-dev-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Per-user MCP token, prefix zaai_mcp_. Mint at https://www.zaaistudio.com/dev/settings/tokens (kind = mcp). Sent as Bearer auth on every workspace request; scopes the server to one user's captures and optionally a project allowlist.
environmentVariables.name: ZAAI_API_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Workspace base URL. Defaults to https://www.zaaistudio.com. Override only for local dev or staging.
environmentVariables.name: ZAAI_API_URL
